title: Where an employer has given notice to an employee to terminate
content:
his contract of employment, and has offered to renew his contract 
of employment, or to re-engage him under a new contract, and—
	
(a)	
the employee dies without having either accepted or 
refused the offer; and
	
(b)	
the offer has not been withdrawn before his death,
subsection (2) or (as the case may be) subsection (3) of section 31C 
shall apply as if, for the words “the employee has unreasonably 
refused”, there were substituted the words “it would have been 
unreasonable on the part of the employee to refuse”.

metadata.source_file: Cap 57 Consolidated version for the Whole Chapter (24-08-2025) (English).pdf
